title: Quest 1.5L Fast Boil Kettles with Spout Filter and Water Level Indicator / 360 Degree Kettle Base/Cord Storage/Removable & Washable Spout Filter / 3000W / 2 Colours (Black/Silver)
features: 1.5L FAST BOIL KETTLE - With a 1.5 litre capacity cordless jug, this fast boil kettle can make up to six cups at once, making it a great choice for family homes or small offices – perfect for everyday use. For your peace of mind, this kettle is BPA-free.

CORD STORAGE – The kettle base moves 360 degrees and includes handy cord storage to keep your worktops tidy and fuss-free. Combining modern design with practical performance, it makes a stylish addition to any kitchen.

SPOUT FILTER – The spout has a removeable and washable filter which makes the kettle easy to clean and maintain, keeping it working to its highest performance. It has a hinged lid for easy filling, a convenient illuminated power indicator, and automatic cut off for safety.
WATER LEVEL INDICATOR – With a transparent fill window, you can easily see and measure how much water you are putting in the kettle while filling it to avoid waste.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Black or White Colours Available Quest Rapid Boil Kettles Enjoy a cup of tea in no time at all using these 3000W Rapid Boil Kettles, which can boil water in just one minute. The kettles include various safety and convenience features, such as a spout filter, cord storage, and automatic overheat protection & shut-off. Their modern design with a hinged lid, cool touch handle and BPA free material make them a stylish addition to any kitchen. Previous page Rapid Boil Kettle With 3000W of power, the kettle can boil up to four cups of water in roughly one minute. Quick Release Lid The button on the kettle's handle allows you to quickly and securely release the lid for filling. Washable Spout Filter The kettle's spout filter can be removed and cleaned, ensuring your drinks stay clean. 1.5 Litre Capacity The kettle has space for 1.5 litres of water, allowing it to boil up to 6 cups at once. LED Indicator Light The power switch conveniently illuminates when active, so you know when boiling is in progress. Next page 1 Rapid Boil Kettle 2 Quick Release Lid 3 Washable Spout Filter 4 1.5 Litre Capacity 5 LED Indicator Light
